explanation: This is a direct reproduction of the true positive command line provided in the Sigma rule. It matches the detection criteria by invoking AgentExecutor.exe with the -powershell flag.

This command line replicates the second true positive example by copying powershell.exe to AgentExecutor.exe and then invoking it with a -Command argument. It matches the detection criteria by using the renamed binary with a PowerShell command.

This command omits the last argument (runAs32BitOn64) while preserving the core behavior. It still triggers the Sigma rule by using the -powershell flag and matching the expected command-line structure.
